RULING:
DEFENDANT ALBAY CONSTRUCTION COMPANY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Argued and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant Albay Construction Company's motion for summary judgment is granted. Defendant satisfied its burden of production and plaintiff did not present any admissible evidence that he was exposed to any asbestos-containing materials disturbed by defendant. Defendant's objections to Mr. Ay's declaration are sustained. Counsel for defendant is to prepare an order. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR # 7077 = (220/HEK)
